title: Chapter Frontmatter Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating Docusaurus chapter frontmatter in the Physical AI textbook

sidebar_position.description: Order of the page in the sidebar navigation

title.description: Full page title displayed in browser tab and heading

description.description: SEO meta description and preview text

estimated_time.description: Expected time to complete (e.g., '30 minutes', '1 hour')

prerequisites.description: Chapter IDs that should be completed before this chapter

slug.description: Custom URL path (optional, auto-generated from filename if omitted)

hide_table_of_contents.description: Whether to hide the right-side TOC

draft.description: Mark page as draft (excluded from production build)

examples.title: Core Concepts: Nodes, Topics, Services, and Actions
examples.description: Master the fundamental building blocks of ROS 2: nodes for computation, topics for streaming data, services for request-response, and actions for long-running tasks.
learning_objectives: Explain the ROS 2 computational graph model
Create and run ROS 2 nodes using Python
Implement publishers and subscribers for topic communication
Use services for synchronous request-response patterns
